Off Calendar Jun-13-2022 Continued To Jul-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-24-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 5, 1993 is admitted to probate. Jacqueline L. Yin is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is assigned probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 13, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
